name: bigdft
description: Use the BigDFT electronic structure code: install from source, generate input files, build atomic systems with PyBigDFT, configure pseudopotentials and linear scaling, and parse logfile output.

interface.shortDescription: Install, configure, and run BigDFT calculations with PyBigDFT.
interface.longDescription: Skills for using the BigDFT electronic structure code as an end user: installing from source, generating input files, building atomic systems, configuring pseudopotentials and linear scaling, and parsing logfile output.
